name: Start Session
description: Initialize a new strategy session (moves to SPEC)

name: Generate STRATEGY-SPEC (Wizard)
description: Interactive questionnaire to produce STRATEGY-SPEC.md with unique Rule_IDs

name: Open STRATEGY-SPEC
description: View STRATEGY-SPEC.md (edit it if needed)

name: Validate Gate 1
description: Run Gate 1 validation and transition to LOGIC if passed

name: Generate LOGIC-MODEL (Wizard)
description: Create LOGIC-MODEL.md populated with Rule_IDs from STRATEGY-SPEC

name: Open LOGIC-MODEL
description: View LOGIC-MODEL.md (edit it if needed)

name: Validate Gate 2
description: Run Gate 2 validation and transition to CODE if passed

name: Generate Code Skeletons (Wizard)
description: Generate MT4/MT5/Pine code skeletons from templates

name: List Code Artifacts
description: List generated code files

name: Validate Gate 3
description: Run Gate 3 validation and transition to TEST if passed

name: Generate TEST-REPORT (Wizard)
description: Create TEST-REPORT.md with required metric placeholders

name: Open TEST-REPORT
description: View TEST-REPORT.md (edit it if needed)

name: Validate Gate 4
description: Run Gate 4 validation and transition to PROOF if passed

name: Open PROOF-CERTIFICATE
description: View or create PROOF-CERTIFICATE.md

name: Finalize Workflow
description: Finalize PROOF -> COMPLETE (requires PROOF-CERTIFICATE.md)

name: Export Package
description: Create deployment ZIP with all artifacts

name: Status
description: Show current phase/gate/agent and next step hint

name: Checklist
description: Show all gates and current pass/fail status

name: Audit
description: Show traceability map + audit trail

name: Party Mode
description: Show all agent personas (team view)

name: BMAD Help
description: Guidance and suggested next commands
